summary: Implementation review approved for GH-105 implementation head d3d3b03e177a273ac4f92ed245b008c8813d234c. The change adds dependency-free Core helpers for terminal success and structured failure envelopes, records terminal result/failure fields through the existing Run Record store, tightens schema/fixture coverage, and leaves API query/App/Harbor/Lode/real execution/storage/write behavior out of scope.
